signals.trend_title: Generative AI Services Demand: 180% Revenue Growth at Indian IT Leaders
EU AI Act Compliance: $500M Implementation Opportunity for Indian IT
DOGE Federal Tech Cuts: Indian IT Companies Pivot to Private Sector
BFSI Cloud Migration Drives $12B Deal Wins for Indian IT FY2026
HCL Technologies €380M Acquisition Expands EU SAP Practice
Wipro AI360: 30,000 Employees Certified, 65% AI Deal Growth

source_intel.real_time_relevance: Company earnings releases (Q3 FY2026) and acquisition announcements provide the highest signal density for company_first mode — prioritize BSE/NSE filings and company press rooms.
source_intel.noise_filtering: IT sector articles without specific deal values or financial metrics should be deprioritized — vague 'AI transformation' coverage adds noise without actionable signal.
source_intel.quality_metrics: Deal value specificity ($100M+ contracts) should receive score boost in trend analysis; vague deal announcements underperform in lead conversion.

boost_trends: Company-specific financial milestones (deal pipeline crossing thresholds, quarterly results) outperform sector-wide trend articles for lead generation precision.
M&A events at target companies create highest-urgency post-acquisition integration sales opportunity — prioritize.

personalization_tips: Reference the specific deal value or metric (₹63,847 crore revenue, 340 AI projects) in outreach — specificity demonstrates research depth and increases open rates.
For IT company targets (B2B selling TO the IT companies), VP Alliances and partnership roles consistently outperform CTO for first contact.
targeting_improvements: Company_first mode benefits from expanding hop-2 and hop-3 to the IT company's enterprise clients — the client ecosystem is often easier to reach than the IT company itself.
Post-acquisition integration signals should trigger immediate outreach — the 90-day window is the highest-urgency period.

retrospective.summary: Company_first mode on Infosys, TCS, Wipro, and HCL Technologies generated 8 high-confidence leads across 6 trend clusters, with exceptional contact coverage (100% of companies have verified email + LinkedIn contacts). The causal reasoning chain consistently expanded beyond the 4 target companies to their enterprise client ecosystem, yielding richer lead sets than pure target-company-only analysis.
successes: All 4 target companies (Infosys, TCS, Wipro, HCL) converted to actionable lead sheets with VP/C-suite contact data.
Causal chain expansion to client ecosystem (Yes Bank, ICICI Lombard, HDFC Life, Siemens India) added 4 high-quality adjacent leads.
Average lead confidence of 0.882 — highest recorded for company_first mode.
EU AI Act and DOGE/US federal trends provided macro context that makes outreach emails immediately relevant to FY2026 business concerns.

improvement_plan.expected_impact: Add NSE/BSE corporate filings as Tier 1 source for Indian IT company tracking — earnings surprises and major deal announcements discovered hours earlier via filings vs news.
For company_first mode, add an acquisition-trigger detection: when a target company makes an acquisition, immediately generate hop-1 post-acquisition integration leads.
